mission.title: Install and Configure Athenz
mission.description: Athenz is a CNCF platform for X.509 certificate-based service authentication and fine-grained role-based access control (RBAC) in dynamic infrastructures, with mTLS and OAuth2 token support.

steps.title: Clone the Athenz repository
steps.description:
Clone the Athenz project.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/AthenZ/athenz.git
cd athenz
```

steps.title: Start Athenz with Docker
steps.description:
Run Athenz using Docker containers.

```bash
docker compose up -d
```

> This starts ZMS (management), ZTS (token), and the UI components.

steps.title: Verify services are running
steps.description:
Check that the Athenz services are healthy.

```bash
docker compose ps
```

> You should see ZMS, ZTS, and UI containers in running state.

steps.title: Access the Athenz UI
steps.description:
Open the Athenz management console.

```bash
curl -k https://localhost:9443/athenz
```

> The Athenz UI is available at https://localhost:9443.

uninstall.title: Uninstall Athenz
uninstall.description:
Stop and remove Athenz containers.

```bash
docker compose down
```
